positive: A delicate, detailed botanical illustration of exotic jungle flora, featuring monstera leaves, ferns, and glowing bioluminescent mushrooms. Style of scientific drawing combined with watercolor washes, minimalist background, high contrast, vibrant but muted natural palette, clean lines, perfect symmetry.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy, harsh shadows, photorealism, digital noise
